name: alpha-assistant
changelog: The shared brain now has two tiers: a lean Core that loads every session (People, Projects, Decisions, Insights, and two new ones: Meetings and Goals), plus a new Archive tier for heavier, scoped material (Students/Families, Playbooks, Glossary) that the assistant reads only when it actually needs to

Operating Principles are no longer seeded into Decisions — they stay as doctrine in the Operating Framework, which your assistant reads directly. Decisions now reflects real operational decisions only, not mission statements

Meetings are now first-class: every meeting gets a lean row, with decisions and insights linked back to it. Weekly digests and morning rituals use Meetings for context ('what happened in last week's sync?')
Goals track quarterly/monthly commitments alongside Projects — your weekly digest now highlights any at-risk goal you own
Students/Families is permission-gated at the Notion level: coaches see their own students, nobody else does, and your assistant silently skips what it can't see — no prompts, no retries
Run /update to pick up the new packs; your assistant boots into the new model from its next session
changelog_semver: CONTRACT.md v1.4: Rule 14 rewritten for bi-level AI Memory (Core + Archive). Five lean invariants codified (no cross-tier duplication, stated retention per DB, one canonical query per DB, canon not mirrored, Core eager / Archive lazy). Rule 14a added: Archive reads are permission-gated by Notion — denied reads are silently skipped, never retried, never prompted.
Notion: created 📚 AI Memory — Archive parent page under the Alpha AI OS — V1 hub, with scope statement + invariants + permission model.
Notion: created three Archive DBs — 🎓 Students / Families (default-deny scoped), 📘 Playbooks (pointer index, never SOP bodies), 📖 Glossary (~100-row soft cap).

Notion: created two Core DBs — 🗓 Meetings (event backbone; Title+Date key; relates to People/Projects/Students and produces Decisions/Insights), 🎯 Goals (Goal+Period key; Owner → People; relates to Projects + Decisions).
Notion cleanup: moved five Operating-Principle pages out of the ✅ Decisions DB; Principles stay canonical in the Operating Framework and are read there, not mirrored.

NOTION-SYNC.md: replaced single 4-DB table with Core (6 DBs) + Archive (3 DBs) tables including natural keys + primary relations. Boot check expanded to verify 6 Core DBs reachable + Archive parent page; Archive row-level denials are expected and skipped silently.

packs/company-brain.md: added DB semantics for Meetings, Goals, Students, Playbooks, Glossary. Added Core-vs-Archive classification heuristic. Defined Archive → Core promotion rule (by link only, never by copy). Added per-DB growth expectation table and quarterly Archive audit.

packs/company-brain-seed.md: dropped Step 2 (Operating Principles → Decisions seed). Decisions and Insights now start empty. Added lean seed for Meetings (recurring-meeting stubs only) and Goals (current period only). Archive DBs are explicitly not seeded.

packs/company-meetings.md: every processed meeting now upserts a Meetings row as the event backbone; Decisions and Insights produced are linked back via Source Meeting + Decisions Produced / Insights Produced relations. Goals updates are written when a meeting surfaces goal status.

packs/company-rituals.md + digests/email-weekly.md: morning check-in and weekly digest now query Goals (owned, at-risk) and Meetings (upcoming + last 7 days). Weekly email digest adds Goals and Meetings sections.
onboarding/setup-questionnaire.md Block 8: boot check verifies all 6 Core DBs + the Archive parent page. Archive row-level denials are expected and skipped silently per Rule 14a.

memory/brain-cache/README.md: split into core/ (short TTL, eager) and archive/ (long TTL, lazy) namespaces. Meetings (2h), Goals (6h), Playbooks + Glossary (24h). Students / Families is never cached locally; every read goes live.
docs/SPEC.md: four-layers diagram shows Core + Archive. Contract summary Rule 14 updated with 14a. Notion structure tree updated with 9 DBs. Roadmap entry added for v1.6.0.

AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursor/rules/alpha-assistant.mdc: aligned with 15 Contract rules and the Rule 14 carve-out (AI Memory DB row creation is allowed; other new Notion pages still need explicit consent). Boot checklists reference Core + Archive verification and Rule 14a permission handling.

download._note: sha256 + size are populated in the release-attached copy of this manifest. The in-repo copy intentionally omits them because its own hash would be a self-reference. Assistants read the remote manifest via manifest_url to get the live numbers. The asset name is unversioned (alpha-assistant.zip) from v1.6.0 onwards so the Notion hub's download link never drifts.
